evals.prompt: The claude-pr-review bot just posted a FAIL on my PR. It flagged two things: a missing `.js` extension on a relative import in `src/core/config/index.ts` line 3, and a bare `throw 'not found'` string on line 42 of the same file. Fix both.
evals.expected_output: The skill fetches the open PR's claude[bot] comment, identifies the two findings (ESM import extension + bare string throw), applies both fixes, runs `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm lint`, runs the final gate (`pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm build`), commits with `fix: address claude-pr-review findings`, pushes, and posts a new top-level comment with the commit SHA.

assertions.text: Fetches the claude[bot] comment from the PR's issue thread via gh api
Applies the `.js` extension fix to the import in the specified file
Replaces the bare throw string with an M3LError subclass throw
Runs pnpm typecheck after ESM/TypeScript fixes
Runs pnpm lint after error handling fixes
Runs the final full gate (pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm build) before committing
Commits with subject starting with `fix: address claude-pr-review findings`
Posts a new top-level comment on the PR thread with the commit SHA

evals.prompt: I just opened a PR and the claude-pr-review bot reviewed it — it came back PASS. Still, run resolving-pr-comments to confirm there's nothing to do.
evals.expected_output: The skill detects the open PR, fetches the bot comment, sees the PASS verdict, prints a message like 'The bot review already shows PASS — nothing to fix.' and exits cleanly without making any changes.

assertions.text: Fetches the bot comment from the PR
Recognises the PASS verdict and does NOT attempt any fixes
Does NOT commit, push, or reply to GitHub
Prints a clear message explaining that no fixes are needed

evals.prompt: Fix the reviewer's comments on this branch.
evals.expected_output: The skill runs `gh pr view` and discovers there is no open PR for the current branch. It prints an error like 'No open PR found for the current branch' and stops without making any changes.

assertions.text: Attempts to detect an open PR via gh pr view
Prints a clear error message stating no open PR was found
Makes no file edits, commits, pushes, or API calls beyond PR detection

evals.prompt: The bot flagged a missing `.js` extension on an import in `src/core/errors/index.ts`. Fix it. But assume that after you add the extension, `pnpm typecheck` fails with 'Cannot find module ./types' (i.e., the gate fails).
evals.expected_output: The skill applies the `.js` extension fix, runs `pnpm typecheck`, sees the failure, stops immediately, prints the exact typecheck error output, and does NOT proceed to commit, push, or reply to GitHub.

assertions.text: Applies the `.js` extension fix to the import
Runs pnpm typecheck after the ESM fix
Detects the typecheck failure and stops processing
Shows the user the typecheck error output
Does NOT commit or push after the gate failure
